description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front face features a combination of flat panels, a vertical glass or mirrored section, and several horizontal lines indicating drawers or sliding doors. The right side of the front has a tall rectangular glass panel, likely for display or easy viewing of contents, and below it are multiple drawers or compartments. The sides and back are plain, with a consistent wood grain texture and no visible hardware or openings. The cabinet appears solid and robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways. Its overall appearance suggests it is designed for both storage and display purposes.
description: A large, dark brown wooden cabinet with a glass panel and multiple drawers, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main features: a glass panel on the right, several drawers, and flat wooden panels.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain, showing a solid wood surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: The back view is featureless, displaying a continuous wood grain surface.
description_view_3: The right side view is also plain, matching the left side with a solid wood appearance.
